productDisplayName: Puma Men's Speed Cat White Blue Shoe
description: Composition:White, princess blue motorsport shoes with leather uppers, rubber outsolesThese white motosport shoes from puma combines the best of Scuderia ferrari components with the ever fresh vulcanized look. The high tops come in long lasting  leather uppers with breathable airmesh inserts on the sides making it a great combination of form and function. The rubber outsoles with the tyre pattern are great for the race course.
